payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a white plastic vertical electrical outlet wall plate with two narrow rectangular receptacle openings and a central mounting screw, smooth matte finish and slightly edge-cropped on the left; approximate distance from camera ~0.6 m.
